店主殿！ もしやこれは、つぶあんとこしあんを混ぜ合わせているのではっ？<br>―:
Master shopkeeper! You're mixing both chunky and smooth bean
paste? Just as I thought! Fufu, I'm good at identifying sweets' ingredients!
え？ 当たったご褒美に、もう一つ作っていただけるのですか……！？<br>あ、あり:
Eh? As a reward for guessing correctly, you'll make me another one?!
Ah, thank you very much! Yes, of course I'll wait until it's ready!
――むむっ！ 今、わたしを呼ぶ司令官殿の声が！<br>なにか、困りごとでしょうか:
Huh! That was Lord Commander's voice calling me! Has something
happened...?
うぅ～っ！ た、たい焼きは惜しいですが、騎士として、困っている<br>主の元に駆:
Aww... I hate to leave the taiyaki, but as a knight, I must rush to my
master's aid! Forgive me, Master shopkeeper!
